# pii_biometric corpus. Synthetic genetic-file headers (Block 8d).

# === Genetic file headers ===
# expect: Consumer DNA Raw Data Header
rsid chromosome position genotype
# expect: VCF Genomic File Header
vcf header line: ##fileformat=VCFv4.2
# expect: FASTQ Sequence Record
@SEQ_ID_001
GATTTGGGGTTCAAAGCAGTAT
+
# expect: FASTA Sequence Record
>seq1 sample description
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIE
